dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_threat} struck our settlement at night and dragged off several people. {quest_stakes} are being held at {quest_focus}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} quickly, {quest_time_pressure}. {quest_ally} spotted the camp {location_hint}. Gather {quest_item} along the way: we may need them to break through the defenses.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every moment we wait, those people suffer. Please, you are our only hope.

playerResponses.text: I will bring them home. Every last one.
How many captors are we talking about?
That camp sounds like a fortress. I cannot do this alone.

dialogueChunks.intro: Since {quest_origin}, {player_name}, {quest_stakes} have been trapped inside {quest_focus}. We can hear them calling out, but the path is blocked.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} by clearing the rubble. The {enemy_type} have been drawn to the site by the noise and are lurking {location_hint}. We also need {quest_item} to shore up the walls.
dialogueChunks.outro: Air will run out down there. Every hour counts, {player_name}.

playerResponses.text: People are trapped. I will not stand by.
Crawling into a collapsing mine with monsters? What is my cut?
I am not dying in a hole in the ground.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_focus} has been surrounded by {quest_threat} for days. {quest_stakes} are running low on supplies and cannot hold much longer.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Someone needs to {quest_action} from the outside. The {enemy_type} are dug in {location_hint}. If you bring {quest_item}, the defenders can use them to counterattack.
dialogueChunks.outro: Save them, and you will have access to {quest_reward_hint} and the gratitude of every soul inside those walls.

playerResponses.text: A siege needs breaking? I am on my way.
Tell me more about this armory.
One person against a horde? No.
